title: podorungia clandestina
parts: Podorungia clandestina has many medicinal parts, such as the roots, leaves, and flowers. The roots of Podorungia clandestina contain various bioactive compounds, including alkaloids, glycosides, and flavonoids, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The leaves and flowers of the plant also contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are believed to have antimicrobial and anti-cancer properties. The medicinal constituents of Podorungia clandestina have been studied for their potential therapeutic applications in treating various diseases, including cancer, inflammation, and microbial infections.
